publicBook.pageSubtitle: Reserve your spot at {{studio}} in a few quick steps.

design.pickHint: Pick a piece from the collection, or start with a consultation.
design.consultCardDesc: Book a consultation and plan your piece together with an artist.
design.consultSelectedDesc: You'll decide on size, placement and price with your artist during the session.
design.noVariants: This design is sized and priced during a consultation with the artist.

schedule.pickArtistFirst: Choose an artist to see their availability.

schedule.noSlots: No open times on this day.
schedule.holdFailed: We couldn't reserve that time. Please pick another slot.

details.holdBanner: This time is held for you for
details.name: Full name

details.policy: I understand that a deposit of {{percent}}% is due at confirmation, and that cancelling less than 48 hours before the session forfeits the deposit.

confirmed.title: You're booked!

errors.holdExpired: Your reservation expired — please pick a new time.
